message:
perf(scan): defer open-file checks to post-scoring for faster scan startup

Restructure run_scan to compute scores and apply veto filters before
checking whether files are open, since open-file detection (/proc/*/fd
walk) is the most expensive preflight operation:

- Score and filter all entries first with is_open=false (cheap)
- Sort by score descending, then iterate in rank order
- Only call collect_open_files() + OpenPathCache after filtering
- Skip open files during ranked iteration, stop at args.top results
- Avoids paying the /proc walk cost for entries that would be vetoed
  by score threshold anyway

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
